name: Applesauce Bar Cookies, Low-Cal
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 375°F.
2 Prepare the bottom of an 11 x 7 inch pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3 Sift together flour, baking soda, spices, and salt.
4 Cream together margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
5 Add egg to the margarine mixture and beat until well combined.
6 Alternately add the dry ingredients and applesauce, stirring just enough to blend well.
7 Fold in the raisins.
8 Pour into the prepared pan and bake for about 30 minutes.
9 Let cool for 10 minutes before cutting into 24 squares.
